title: aspidium costulare
intro: Aspidium costulare, also known as the costulate spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspidium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aspidium costulare include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Aspidium costulare are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
